title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oxford University Press India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oxford University Press India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Oxford University Press India:
Oxford University Press India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
